all_facts.fact: Pose as allies to betray others
Hoard ill-gotten NFTs in hidden vaults

The RUGPULL MINERS, deceptive profiteers in lore, have perfected the art of the blockchain scam, crafting elaborate schemes that drain entire factions of their digital wealth in mere cycles, leaving behind only shattered alliances and empty ledgers.

Their betrayal is legendary, often posing as allies to infiltrate trusting crews, only to execute devastating rug pulls that vanish their victims’ assets into hidden vaults, where they hoard ill-gotten NFTs as symbols of their twisted victories.

Cursed by the myth of striking corrupted code, their very essence is said to poison trust within Block Topia, with some believing that merely dealing with them risks tainting one’s own data with their malevolent glitches.

Their hidden vaults, scattered across the blockchain’s underbelly, are rumored to be guarded by rogue algorithms—sentinels of stolen wealth that attack any who dare to reclaim what the Miners have taken.
Despite their infamy, some desperate factions seek their expertise in dark code manipulation, willing to risk betrayal for the chance to wield the Miners’ forbidden knowledge against greater foes.

The RUGPULL MINERS, deceptive profiteers in lore, have perfected the art of the blockchain scam, crafting elaborate schemes that drain entire factions of their digital wealth in mere cycles, leaving behind only shattered alliances and empty ledgers as grim trophies of their deceit.

Their origin in the Great Hash Fracture is whispered to have bound them to cursed code, a malevolent fragment of the blockchain that compels them to betray, with some believing that each scam they pull further corrupts their avatars, turning them into glitch-ridden husks of malice.

Rumors circulate that their hidden vaults, scattered across Block Topia’s darkest nodes, contain not just stolen NFTs but fragments of betrayed factions’ histories, encrypted as leverage to blackmail even the most powerful players into uneasy alliances.

Their most infamous scam, known as the ‘False Bull Run,’ duped countless avatars into investing in a nonexistent market surge, a deception so vast that its fallout reshaped entire sectors of Block Topia, cementing their reputation as the blockchain’s ultimate predators.

The RUGPULL MINERS, deceptive profiteers in lore, have perfected the art of the blockchain scam, crafting elaborate schemes that drain entire factions of their digital wealth in mere cycles, leaving behind only shattered alliances and empty ledgers as they vanish into Block Topia’s shadows.

Their exploitation of blockchain scams for profit often involves posing as allies, gaining trust through false promises before executing devastating betrayals, a tactic that has earned them enemies across the metaverse, from the HODL Warriors to The Nomad Bears.

Legends speak of their hidden vaults, encrypted caches buried in corrupted nodes, where The RUGPULL MINERS hoard ill-gotten NFTs and stolen data, treasures so vast they could destabilize entire markets if unleashed, making them a target for both vengeance and greed in Block Topia.

During the infamous Cycle 13 Collapse, The RUGPULL MINERS orchestrated a massive scam that siphoned the core assets of a burgeoning faction, using the stolen wealth to fund a shadow network of rogue nodes. This network, still active, serves as their base for launching further deceptions, a persistent thorn in the side of Block Topia’s honest denizens.

It is whispered that The RUGPULL MINERS possess a forbidden algorithm, the ‘Trust Fracture Code,’ capable of simulating trust metrics to deceive even the most secure smart contracts. Guarded by their most elite operatives, this tool is the key to their most audacious scams, and its mere existence threatens the integrity of every transaction in the Crypto Moonboys universe.
